overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through Night City's neon-lit downtown district. The camera follows a pedestrian character along sidewalks and across intersections, showcasing the game's detailed urban environment with holographic advertisements, wet reflective streets, and futuristic architecture.

events.description: exiting the covered overpass area into the open street with visible storefronts

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian character walking along the sidewalk under the overpass

notable_agents.action: character in pink shorts and white jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass with curved orange support beams overhead
textured orange safety paving running along the sidewalk edge
piles of garbage bags and scattered debris against the concrete wall
large illuminated advertisement screen displaying animated content
tall street lamp with warm orange light illuminating the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a massive concrete highway overpass with orange structural beams. The camera follows a character walking along a sidewalk with distinctive orange tactile paving, passing trash bags and debris. Neon billboards glow in the distance as the scene transitions from the sheltered overpass to a more open commercial street.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with neon storefronts and vending machines

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past various shops, vending machines, and neon signs

notable_agents.action: character in pink shorts maintaining steady pace ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
illuminated vending machine with glowing blue interface
bright red neon sign for commercial establishment
modern building with reflective blue-tinted glass windows

segments.scene_description: Walking along an open commercial street lined with modern glass buildings and graffiti-covered walls. The sidewalk features continuous orange tactile paving. Neon signs and illuminated vending machines line the left side while the camera maintains a steady pace following the pedestrian ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with marked pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: beginning to cross the street at the marked crosswalk
black sports car and teal sedan drive through the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection at a marked crosswalk while observing passing traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sports car with neon underglow driving through the intersection
pedestrian in dark clothing crossing from right to left in front of the camera

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings
multiple large holographic advertisements covering the building facades ahead
tall palm tree visible across the intersection

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban intersection as the camera steps onto the crosswalk. Large digital billboards and holographic advertisements dominate the buildings ahead. Vehicles including a black sports car pass through the intersection while another pedestrian crosses in the opposite direction. The ground transitions to asphalt with prominent yellow crosswalk stripes.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with decorative planters and digital displays

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past large illuminated planters with trees

entered.detail: large rectangular concrete planter with trees and illuminated blue edge lighting
green glowing holographic advertisement display showing abstract graphics

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the camera proceeds along the opposite sidewalk featuring large concrete planters with palm trees and glowing edge lighting. A prominent green holographic display illuminates the right side while the street continues ahead with more digital billboards visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sheltered shadows of a concrete overpass into the vibrant, neon-saturated heart of a futuristic commercial district. It begins beneath massive orange structural beams, following a character along a sidewalk of orange tactile paving past scattered debris and distant glowing billboards. As the camera leaves the overpass, the environment opens into a street lined with glass buildings, graffiti-covered walls, and illuminated vending machines. The scene then expands into a wide urban intersection where the ground shifts to asphalt with yellow crosswalk stripes, surrounded by towering holographic advertisements and passing sports cars. Finally, the camera proceeds along the opposite sidewalk, passing concrete planters with palm trees and glowing edge lighting under the radiance of a prominent green holographic display.
